title: Modern Elevators and Escalators
description: Fully functional, realistic, and advanced elevators and escalators in Minecraft!
body: # Please Read! Important Notes _Please read the following and back up your worlds before downloading!_ - [Fabric only] [**Fabric API**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) is REQUIRED. Install the latest version of Fabric API (for the corresponding Minecraft version). - [Fabric only] [**Mod Menu**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modmenu) is optional but provides an easy way to configure the mod's settings. - [Forge only] [**Architectury**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-forge) is REQUIRED. Install the latest version of Architectury (for the corresponding Minecraft version). - **This mod will not be updated for any older Minecraft version.** The source code is publicly available on GitHub, so you are free to do it yourself. Please report any issues or bugs that you find; that would be greatly appreciated! Refer to the [todo list](https://github.com/jonafanho/Minecraft-Transit-Railway/wiki/Todo-List) to see currently known issues. ### How to make elevators [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vhTKectuIbg](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vhTKectuIbg) ### How to make escalators [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QH1O-y6kPSk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QH1O-y6kPSk) ## Ready for the full experience? [**Try out Minecraft Transit Railway now!**](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) ## Help Translate the Mod! The [Crowdin site for the Modern Elevators and Escalators mod](https://crwd.in/minecraft-transit-railway) is available! Crowdin is a cloud-based platform for translators to contribute to a project. With your help, we can translate the mod to many different languages. You may create a free account to start translating. ## Questions? Comments? Complaints? Let's connect.       [![Join us on Discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jonafanho/Minecraft-Transit-Railway/master/images/footer/join-us-on-discord.png)](https://discord.gg/PVZ2nfUaTW) [![Become a Patron on Patreon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jonafanho/Minecraft-Transit-Railway/master/images/footer/become-a-patron-on-patreon.png)](https://www.patreon.com/minecraft_transit_railway)
